fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the item for which another item can serve as a substitute.
The program copies this item number from the Sub. Item No. field on the Item Substitution table.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code of the variant for which another variant can serve as a substitute.
The program copies the variant code from the Variant Code field on the Item Substitution table.

fields.name: Substitute No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the substitute item.
The program copies the substitute item from the Substitute Item No. field in the Item Substitution table.

fields.name: Substitute Variant Code
fields.tooltip:
Contains the variant code of the substitute item.
The program copies the substitute variant code from the Substitute Variant Code field in the Item Substitution table.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the line.
The program numbers the lines sequentially and uses the numbers to keep track of the different sales lines.

fields.name: Condition
fields.tooltip: Specifies the condition for item substitution.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Contains the type of the item for which another item can serve as a substitute. There are two types: Item and Nonstock Item.

fields.name: Substitute Type
fields.tooltip: Contains the type of the substitute item. There are two types: Item and Nonstock Item.
